description: BUILD_SERVER modeled as Lock
ARTIFACT_STORE modeled as Lock
TEST_ENV modeled as Lock
STAGING_ENV modeled as Lock
PROD_BLUE modeled as Lock
PROD_GREEN modeled as Lock
CANARY_SLOTS modeled as Counter (initial=3)
channel from BUILD_MASTER to FRONTEND_DEV for build/revision requests
channel from BUILD_MASTER to BACKEND_DEV for build/revision requests
channel from FRONTEND_DEV to BUILD_MASTER for build reports
channel from BACKEND_DEV to BUILD_MASTER for build reports
channel from BUILD_MASTER to SECURITY_REVIEWER for security review request
channel from SECURITY_REVIEWER to BUILD_MASTER for security verdict
channel from BUILD_MASTER to DB_ADMIN for migration request
channel from DB_ADMIN to BUILD_MASTER for migration report
channel from BUILD_MASTER to QA_ENGINEER for test request
channel from QA_ENGINEER to BUILD_MASTER for test report
channel from BUILD_MASTER to RELEASE_ENGINEER for deploy request
channel from RELEASE_ENGINEER to BUILD_MASTER for deploy report
channels from BUILD_MASTER to all agents for pipeline-complete
each developer's build can pass or fail
security scan can pass or fail per component
DB migration can pass or fail
QA tests can pass or fail
staging smoke tests can fail
canary smoke tests can fail at any traffic percentage
production smoke tests can fail
security review requires passing builds
DB migration starts only after security approval
QA testing starts only after migration completes
deployment starts only after QA passes
CANARY_SLOTS acquired incrementally: 33% → 66% → 100%
publish requires holding BOTH BUILD_SERVER and ARTIFACT_STORE
DB_ADMIN needs BUILD_SERVER for migration scripts
DB_ADMIN needs STAGING_ENV for test migration
artifact pulls require holding ARTIFACT_STORE
QA testing requires holding TEST_ENV
canary deployment requires holding PROD_GREEN + CANARY_SLOTS
blue-green swap requires acquiring PROD_BLUE to drain connections
6-lock contention with 7 agents competing for infrastructure
developers need BUILD_SERVER→ARTIFACT_STORE; QA/release need ARTIFACT_STORE→TEST_ENV — ABBA pattern
publisher (dev), puller (QA/release/security), all need ARTIFACT_STORE — blocks overlap
DB_ADMIN holds BUILD_SERVER + STAGING_ENV during migration — blocks builds and staging deploys
security rejection forces rebuild → re-needs BUILD_SERVER + ARTIFACT_STORE
canary failure at 66% requires releasing 2 CANARY_SLOTS + PROD_GREEN — cascading rollback
blue-green swap requires holding PROD_GREEN AND acquiring PROD_BLUE simultaneously
CANARY_SLOTS=3 acquired incrementally — partial acquire + failure requires full release
QA failure → dev rebuild → re-needs BUILD_SERVER + ARTIFACT_STORE → QA re-needs ARTIFACT_STORE + TEST_ENV
frontend and backend cannot build simultaneously (shared BUILD_SERVER)
